tool_response.originalFile:
# Welcome to Jekyll!
#
# This config file is meant for settings that affect your entire site, values
# which you are expected to set up once and rarely need to edit after that.
# For technical reasons, this file is *NOT* reloaded automatically when you use
# `jekyll serve`. If you change this file, please restart the server process.

# Site Settings
title                    : "Lorem ipsum"
description              : "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Vivamus ornare aliquet ipsum, ac tempus justo dapibus sit amet. "
repository               : "RayeRen/acad-homepage.github.io"
google_scholar_stats_use_cdn : true

# google analytics
google_analytics_id      :  # get google_analytics_id from https://analytics.google.com/analytics/

# SEO Related
google_site_verification :  # get google_site_verification from https://search.google.com/search-console/about
bing_site_verification   :  # get bing_site_verification from https://www.bing.com/webmasters/about
baidu_site_verification  :  # get baidu_site_verification from https://ziyuan.baidu.com/login/index?u=/site/index

# Site Author
author:
  name             : "Lorem ipsum"
  avatar           : "images/android-chrome-512x512.png"
  bio              : "Lorem ipsum College"
  location         : "Beijing, China"
  employer         :
  pubmed           : 
  googlescholar    : "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_GOOGLE_SCHOLAR_ID"
  email            : "Lorem@ipsum.com"
  researchgate     :  # e.g., "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/yourprofile"
  uri              :
  bitbucket        :
  codepen          :
  dribbble         :
  flickr           :
  facebook         :
  foursquare       :
  github           : # e.g., "github username"
  google_plus      :
  keybase          :
  instagram        :
  impactstory      : # e.g., "https://profiles.impactstory.org/u/xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx"
  lastfm           :
  linkedin         : # e.g., "linkedin username"
  dblp             : # e.g., "https://dblp.org/pid/xx/xxxx.html"
  orcid            : # e.g., "https://orcid.org/xxxx"
  pinterest        :
  soundcloud       :
  stackoverflow    : # http://stackoverflow.com/users/123456/username
  steam            :
  tumblr           :
  twitter          : 
  vine             :
  weibo            :
  xing             :
  youtube          :
  wikipedia        :


# Reading Files
include:
  - .htaccess
  - _pages
  - files
exclude:
  - docs
  - google_scholar_crawler
  - "*.sublime-project"
  - "*.sublime-workspace"
  - .asset-cache
  - .bundle
  - .jekyll-assets-cache
  - .sass-cache
  - .github
  - CHANGELOG
  - Capfile
  - Gemfile
  - Gruntfile.js
  - LICENSE
  - README
  - Rakefile
  - assets/js/_main.js
  - assets/js/plugins
  - assets/js/vendor
  - config
  - gulpfile.js
  - log
  - node_modules
  - package.json
  - tmp
  - vendor
keep_files:
  - .git
  - .svn
encoding: "utf-8"
markdown_ext: "markdown,mkdown,mkdn,mkd,md"


# Conversion
markdown: kramdown
highlighter: rouge
lsi: false
excerpt_separator: "\n\n"
incremental: false


# Markdown Processing
kramdown:
  input: GFM
  hard_wrap: false
  auto_ids: true
  footnote_nr: 1
  entity_output: as_char
  toc_levels: 1..6
  smart_quotes: lsquo,rsquo,ldquo,rdquo
  enable_coderay: false

# Defaults
defaults:
  # _pages
  - scope:
      path: ""
      type: pages
    values:
      layout: default
      author_profile: true


# Sass/SCSS
sass:
  sass_dir: _sass
  style: compressed # http://sass-lang.com/documentation/file.SASS_REFERENCE.html#output_style


# Outputting
permalink: /:categories/:title/
timezone: Asia/Shanghai # http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones


# Plugins
plugins:
  - jekyll-paginate
  - jekyll-sitemap
  - jekyll-gist
  - jekyll-feed
  - jekyll-redirect-from
# mimic GitHub Pages with --safe
whitelist:
  - jekyll-paginate
  - jekyll-sitemap
  - jekyll-gist
  - jekyll-feed
  - jemoji


# HTML Compression
# - http://jch.penibelst.de/
compress_html:
  clippings: all
  ignore:
    envs: development

lines: # `jekyll serve`. If you change this file, please restart the server process.
-description              : "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Vivamus ornare aliquet ipsum, ac tempus justo dapibus sit amet. "
+description              : "Personal homepage of Chang Liu: projects, research notes, writing, experience, and contact information."

# main links links
main:
  - title: "About Me"
    url: "/#about-me"

  - title: "News"
    url: "/#-news"

  - title: "Publications"
    url: "/#-publications"

  - title: "Honors and Awards"
    url: "/#-honors-and-awards"

  - title: "Educations"
    url: "/#-educations"

  - title: "Invited Talks"
    url: "/#-invited-talks"

  - title: "Internships"
    url: "/#-internships"

tool_input.content: --- permalink: / title: "" excerpt: "" author_profile: true redirect_from: - /about/ - /about.html --- # About / 关于 Hi, I am **Chang Liu (刘畅)**. This is my personal homepage for collecting my projects, research interests, writing, experience, and ways to contact me. 你好，我是**刘畅**。这里是我的综合个人主页，用来展示我的项目、研究兴趣、文章记录、学习与工作经历，以及联系方式。 > This page is currently a first-version skeleton. Replace the placeholders below with your real profile, projects, publications, notes, and links. > > 当前页面是第一版骨架。后续可以把下面的占位内容替换为你的真实简介、项目、论文、文章和链接。 **Current focus / 当前关注方向** - Research / 研究方向：_to be updated_ - Engineering / 工程方向：_to be updated_ - Writing / 写作主题：_to be updated_ # Projects / 项目 Use this section to highlight selected work. Each project can include a short description, your role, technology stack, and useful links. 这个板块用于展示代表性项目。每个项目可以包含简介、你的职责、技术栈和相关链接。 ## Featured Projects / 代表项目 - **Project Name / 项目名称** One-sentence summary of what the project does and why it matters. 用一句话说明这个项目做了什么，以及它为什么重要。 _Role / 角色_: Developer / Researcher / Designer _Links / 链接_: [GitHub](https://github.com/ChangLiu-weiyu) / Demo / Paper - **Project Name / 项目名称** Add another project here. 在这里添加另一个项目。 _Tech stack / 技术栈_: Python, JavaScript, Jekyll, etc. # Writing / 写作 This section can collect blog posts, reading notes, research notes, or technical articles. 这个板块可以放博客文章、读书笔记、研究笔记或技术文章。 - _YYYY.MM_ — **Article title / 文章标题**. Short description. [Link](#) - _YYYY.MM_ — **Reading note / 阅读笔记**. Short description. [Link](#) # Experience / 经历 Use this section for education, work, internships, research experience, open-source contributions, awards, and activities. 这个板块可以放教育经历、工作/实习经历、科研经历、开源贡献、获奖和活动。 ## Education / 教育背景 - _YYYY.MM - YYYY.MM_ — **Degree / 学位**, University / 学校. Description / 简短说明。 ## Work & Research / 工作与科研 - _YYYY.MM - YYYY.MM_ — **Position / 职位**, Organization / 机构. Description / 简短说明。 ## Honors / 荣誉 - _YYYY.MM_ — Award name / 奖项名称。 # CV / 简历 You can add a downloadable CV here after preparing the file. 准备好简历文件后，可以在这里添加下载链接。 - [Download CV / 下载简历](files/cv.pdf) _(placeholder / 占位链接)_ # Contact / 联系 - Email / 邮箱：_to be updated_ - GitHub：[@ChangLiu-weiyu](https://github.com/ChangLiu-weiyu) - Google Scholar / 谷歌学术：_to be updated_ - LinkedIn：_to be updated_ If you find anything interesting here, feel free to reach out. 如果你对这里的内容感兴趣，欢迎联系我。

Suspendisse condimentum, libero vel tempus mattis, risus risus vulputate libero, elementum fermentum mi neque vel nisl. Maecenas facilisis maximus dignissim.
